Container.Name: pokecollector-frontend
Container.Overview: PokéCollector Frontend — React/nginx web UI for the Pokemon TCG collection manager. Proxies /api/ requests to the backend container.
Container.Requires: pokecollector-backend must be running in the same Docker network. Custom Docker network required: docker network create pokecollector

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the PokéCollector web interface.
